systemStatus.title: System Status

welcome.title: The audit log enterprise AI agents always needed.
welcome.description: We'll walk you through registering your first agent, defining what it's allowed to do, and showing you what your audit log looks like — in about 3 minutes.
welcome.bullet3: See a synthetic invocation in the audit log

org.title: Name your team
org.description: This is the tenant that owns your agents and audit log. You can rename it later in Settings.

agent.title: Register your first agent
agent.description: An agent is the LLM-driven worker whose actions you'll be governing. You can register more later from the dashboard.
agent.keyNote: We'll encrypt this with your tenant's KMS key. You can rotate it any time from Settings → Secrets.

policy.title: Define what this agent can do
policy.description: Tools your agent is allowed to call, and how. Defaults are sensible — you can edit any row or add more later.

synthetic.title: Fire a test invocation
synthetic.description: We'll generate three example tool calls so you can see what your real agent's actions will look like in the audit log. This is fake data — no external tool will actually be called.
synthetic.note: Real agent calls land here automatically once you wire your agent up.

audit.title: Your audit log, live
audit.description: Below are the three synthetic events from step 4. This is the screen your compliance team will live in.
audit.summary: Real agent invocations land here in real time. Done!

note.pending: High-risk action requires human approval before it runs.
note.denied: Tool not in agent's allowed policy — blocked at the gate.

errors.agentNameRequired: Please enter a name for your agent.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

onboarding.welcomeDescription: ChronoSynth helps you simulate and compare possible outcomes of different life paths. Let's set up your first simulation.
onboarding.valuesDescription: Add the value dimensions most important to you and set their weights. This will affect simulation scoring.
onboarding.atLeastOneValue: Please add at least one value
onboarding.simulationDescription: We'll create a default simulation for you. You can customize more paths and branches later in the dashboard.
onboarding.doneDescription: Your values and first simulation have been created. You can now go to the dashboard to view results.
onboarding.templateDescription: Pick a template that fits you best. We'll preset value parameters for you.
onboarding.templateCareerDesc: Pursue professional achievement and financial growth
onboarding.templateFamilyDesc: Focus on family relationships and personal growth
onboarding.templateExplorerDesc: Seek freedom and rich life experiences

explorer.label: Explorer
explorer.description: Bold and decisive — high exploration, high risk, quick to act, short-to-mid horizon.

guardian.label: Guardian
guardian.description: Cautious and loss-averse — low risk, high loss aversion, deliberate, long horizon.

analyst.label: Analyst
analyst.description: Thoughtful and data-driven — deepest deliberation, longest horizon, high regret sensitivity, neutral risk.

doer.label: Doer
doer.description: Fast-moving and present-focused — high risk, shallowest deliberation, shortest horizon, low loss aversion.

settings.subtitle: User profile and account security
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

sso.missingTokens: SSO authentication failed: missing token information

personas.emptyDescription: Fork from a template or import a snapshot to create your first persona. Each persona has independent values, memory, and decision style.

personaCore.noSelection: Select a persona to inspect its wallet, forks, and memory stream.
personaCore.emptyState: No core personas yet. Create one to bootstrap the OS 2.0 model.

marketplace.emptyState: No marketplace tasks for this status yet.
marketplace.emptyDescription: Publish a marketplace task to let other users' personas pick it up, or browse what's already out there.

filters.enterPersonaTooltip: Enter a personaId in the filter bar first

list.heading: Granted scopes

list.revokeConfirm: Revoke {{scope}}? Any agent currently using this scope will fail immediately.

agentConfirmations.title: Pending Approvals
agentConfirmations.subtitle: High-risk tool calls require your second-step approval before execution; you can revoke the entire grant within 30 s

errors.argsNotObject: arguments must be a JSON object

dialog.title: Approve tool call
dialog.hint: For privacy the backend does not persist arguments; paste the original JSON arguments that triggered this call. Mismatched input_hash will be rejected.

safetyDrift.title: AI Safety / Persona Drift Monitor
safetyDrift.subtitle: Compares value weight deltas across the latest two snapshots; over-threshold writes an audit and fires the webhook

empty.noReport: No drift report yet. Click “Generate report now” to start the first analysis.
empty.noValueDrifts: No comparable value changes in this analysis (likely only one snapshot exists).

0.title: P1.7.2 — Setup checklist + structured empty states + analytics
0.body:
· Floating bottom-right setup checklist: 5-step guide + progress bar + persistent dismissal
· EmptyState upgrade: illustrations + title + primary/secondary CTAs (backward-compatible)
· Client-side analytics tracker + server-side events_user_journey persistence (v069)

1.title: P0.4 / P1.4 — Full i18n + strict CSP
1.body:
· 6 admin/agent pages fully translated for zh-CN + en-US
· Strict CSP + COOP/COEP/CORP + Trusted Types report-only
· HSTS upgraded to 2-year + preload

notFound.title: We can't find that page
notFound.body: The link may have expired, or the path you entered doesn't exist. Try one of the common entry points below.

forbidden.title: You don't have permission to view this page
forbidden.body: This page is admin-only. If you think this is a mistake, contact your tenant administrator.

L3.label: Practitioner
L3.description: Unlock tool invocations and external authorizations

L4.description: Unlock multi-persona, governance, and the admin console

locked.title: Requires level {{level}}
locked.body: Keep using the app to unlock this feature.

hello.title: Welcome to ChronoSynth
hello.body: ChronoSynth is your personal cognition workspace. We help you grow a digital persona that reflects your values, learns from your decisions, and stays aligned with how you want to operate.

persona.title: Personas are your unit of value
persona.body: Every conversation, every simulation, every memory belongs to a persona. Start with one — you can fork or specialize later as your needs evolve.

growth.title: Capabilities unlock with use
growth.body: We don't dump every advanced surface on you on day one. As you spend time with ChronoSynth, new tools, simulations, and admin features appear when they're useful.

firstPersona.title: Create your first persona
firstPersona.body: A persona is the container for your digital identity. Start with one to begin.

firstKnowledge.title: Add a knowledge source
firstKnowledge.body: Give the persona context. Conversations get sharper once knowledge is connected.

errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong. Please retry, or contact support if it persists.
errors.AUTH_REQUIRED: Your session expired. Please sign in again to view conflicts.
errors.AUTH_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to resolve conflicts in this tenant.
errors.STATE_INVALID_TRANSITION: This conflict was already resolved on another device. The inbox was refreshed.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests — please wait a moment and try again.

governance.title: Governance Policy
governance.subtitle: Override the default governance policy for persona {{personaId}}
governance.categoryRoutesHint: Set how the persona takes each task category. Categories left as default follow the persona's default route. This is the full routing table — saving replaces it.
governance.maxAutonomousRewardHint: Tasks above this reward require human review. Leave blank to use default.
governance.amlHint: Anti–wash-trading thresholds over a 24h window. Leave blank to use default.
governance.amlMaxTasksPerPublisher: Max tasks per publisher per window
governance.amlMaxRewardShareHint: 0–1; a single publisher exceeding this share of window reward is treated as related-account cycling.
governance.amlConcentrationMinTasks: Min tasks to trigger concentration check
governance.uncertaintyBudgetHint: Limit how much unverified growth (LLM-teacher-distilled persona changes auto-compiled into the core) the persona absorbs per 24h window. Beyond the cap, further growth goes to human review. Leave blank to use the global default.
governance.unverifiedGrowthBudgetPlaceholder: Blank = global default; 0 = all to human review
governance.conflict: This policy was changed by another session — refresh and retry

workforce.title: Digital Workforce

workforce.noWorkersMessage: This organization has no digital workers yet
workforce.noGoalsMessage: This organization has no goals yet
workforce.initiateGoalHint: Have a manager digital worker run a goal (deterministic decompose→delegate→execute→aggregate, no external side effects)
workforce.pendingApprovalsHint: High-risk execution requires human approval (your approval is recorded as the legal principal)
workforce.goalStartedWithPending: Goal started ({{count}} tasks, {{pending}} pending real execution/approval)

orgMarket.publisherSection: Publisher view: confirm assignment / accept & settle
orgMarket.noAssignments: No tasks assigned to this org
orgMarket.noApplicants: No org applicants for this task
